'''Ord Zeuol'''<ref name="EGTW" /> was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|419|Ord}} states that the term "[[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]]" and the abbreviation "Ord" applied to certain [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] [[Colonist/Legends|settled]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].</ref> in the [[Ord Zeuol system/Legends|Ord Zeuol system]], a part of the [[Vilonis sector/Legends|Vilonis sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of<ref name="Atlas" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The planet served as an [[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]] [[Colonist/Legends|outpost]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Pius Dea Era]], a period of [[Time/Legends|time]] that lasted between approximately [[12,000 BBY/Legends|12,000 BBY]] and [[11,000 BBY]], despite being located outside the Republic's borders.<ref name="EGTW" />

By [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|III}}, which include the [[Padmé Amidala's funeral/Legends|funeral of Padmé Amidala]], to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].</ref> one of Ord Zeuol's natives, the [[Zeuol]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Eeusu Estornii/Legends|Eeusu Estornii]], served in the Republic's [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]]. She<ref name="DB">{{DB|character|eeusuestornii|Estornii, Eesu}}</ref> attended the [[Padmé Amidala's funeral/Legends|funeral]] of the planet [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo's]] Senator [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]<ref name="ROTS">{{Film|III}}</ref> in that [[Standard year/Legends|year]].<ref name="NEC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ord Zeuol was first mentioned in [[2005]]'s reference book ''[[Star Wars Chronicles: The Prequels]]'', authored by [[Stephen J. Sansweet]] and [[Pablo Hidalgo]].<ref name="SWCTP">''[[Star Wars Chronicles: The Prequels]]''</ref> In one instance in the [[StarWars.com]] [[Databank (original)|Databank]] entry for Eeusu Estornii, the planet's name was misspelled as "Ord Zeoul."<ref name="DB" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Ord Zeuol [[Star system/Legends|system]], and thus Ord Zeuol itself, in grid square O-16.<ref name="Atlas" />
